titleStmt.title: SII 9.67: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 67. (A.R. No. 234 of 1913.) ON A STONE IN A STREET AT KOLAGALLU, BELLARY TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: The record is dated Śaka 888, Raktākshi, Āshāḍha, śuddha pañchamī, Bṛihaspativāra, corresponding to A.D. 984 June 16 Thursday; f.d.t. ·24. It refers itself to the reign of the Rāshṭrakūṭa king Akāḷavarshadēva. Chaṅga-Gāvuṇḍa, brother of Ayyappa-Gāvuṇḍa, is said to have made a gift of 30 mattars of wet land, a flower garden and an oil mill to Satyarāśi-Bhaṭāra for the purpose of keeping a students, home (vidyādāna-sattra). Gajādharayya, who was the head of the Kārtikēyatapōvana and who was administering Koḷgallu is said to have confirmed the above gift.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti . sakakāḷabhūpāḷākrānta
namadhēyasaṁvatsarasataṁga 888 neya
raktākṣi saṁvatsaradāṣāḍa suddha pañcami
bṛhaspativāra . svastyakāḷavarṣadēva śrīpri
thvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramē
śvara paramabhaṭṭāraka śrīmaccalakkena
llātana rājyaṁ pravarddhamānaṁ salutti re
Ayyapagāvuṇḍana tammaṁ caṁgagāvu
ṇḍaṁ pusige pēsuvoṁ pisuṇgekāyva
sūjigalla paḍuvaṇa deseyoḷ mū
vattu 30 mattarkeyyumanūra baḍa ga
ṇa diśāvaradoḷondu 1 tōṁṭavuvaṁ maṭa
da mundaṇadondu 1 ghāṇamuma nālva
diṁbarmmahājanada nālvarggāvuṇḍagaḷa pa
kkade svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyāna
mōnānuṣṭānapārāyaṇarappa śrīma
t śatyarāsibhaṭārarargge kālaṁ kaṟci vi
dyādānasatravāge maṭhakke koṭṭaṁ .
vratajapaniyamahōmasaṁyu
kta svāmikārtikēyatapōvanā
dhipati śrīmat gajādharayyaṁ ko
ḷgallāḷe lōhāsanamastakasthi
tanāgi rājyaṁgeyuttuṁ caṁgagā
vuṇḍana koṭṭa mūvattu mattarke yyuva
nondu tōṁṭavuva(ṁ)nondu ghāṇa
vuvaṁ sarbbamānyaparihāravāge
śatyarāsibhaṭārararge koṭṭoṁ .
vasubhirvasudhā bhuktvā rājabhi
ssagarādibhiryyasya yasya yadā
bhūmistasya tasya tadā phaḷaṁ .
svadattamparadattaṁ vā yō ha
rēti vasundharāṁ . ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasaha
srāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
Akhaṇḍitabrahmarājyasthānavidu vira
ḷisidonanūruvarasuviḻdu poṟa
maḍisi kaḷevudī
Digital edition of SII 9.67 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
